title: eryngium bolivianum
intro: Eryngium bolivianum, also known as Bolivian Sea Holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Eryngium bolivianum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in herbal remedies to support respiratory health and reduce stress.
